notes: Model-identification for mistral-vibe: the model NAME (distinct from the context-window bar). Single no-op turn elicits the model; SessionMetrics.ModelName must be the launched model (mistral-medium-3.5), not 'unknown'. The daemon reads it from the meta.json sidecar (config.active_model) via applySidecar on every event; NormalizeModelName leaves mistral ids intact. This is essentially the basic-turn arc; the model assertion is the observations.model exact-match, evidenced after turn_end. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), modeled like claudecode/kiro-cli — birth anchored to start, unpinned. Tokens observable (sidecar stats.context_tokens → turn_done TokenSnapshot); cost is NOT (parser never reads stats.session_cost; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity). Model mistral-medium-3.5 confirmed from live config.active_model. PROVISIONAL on emission: whether a proc-<PID> presession row precedes the session_<...> birth is not source-confirmable — record settles it. Recipe needs wait_turn, which the scaffolded driver stubs (driver=gap:wait_turn); record ports SEAM 2 before driving.

text: session_<...> session born in ready when the transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory)
Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = mistral-medium-3.5 (from meta.json config.active_model, not 'unknown'), turn_done carries Tokens.Total>0
